title: Linux Container Escape Attempt
description: Detects patterns indicating container escape attempts including access to Docker socket, cgroup manipulation, or nsenter usage from within containers.
query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Secure Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Audit Logs') and (((msg like '*nsenter -t 1 -m -u -i -n -p*' or msg like '*/var/run/docker.sock*' or msg like '*mount -t cgroup*' or msg like '*release_agent*' or msg like '*core_pattern*')))
